'''GA21 shield generator''' was a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|device]] used to create a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]]. Created by [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] installed them on the [[HT-2200 medium freighter]] to improve the freighter's defensive capabilities. They also knew that a large percentage of its customer base was involved in less-than-legal freight runs where better shields would be a priority.
